---
title: Teaching
listing:
  - id: talks
    contents: "talks/**/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
  - id: videos
    contents: "videos/**/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
toc: true
---

> In learning you will teach, and in teaching you will learn.
> *-Phil Collins*

## Conference Talks

::: {#talks}
:::

## YouTube Videos

::: {#videos}
:::

## Written Material
